name: Prompt Sanitizer
description: Sanitize LLM prompts: strip PII, detect injection attacks, redact secrets, remove invisible chars, enforce token limits. Inspired by protectai/llm-guard.

tokenLimit.description: Maximum token count (approx 4 chars per token)

bannedSubstrings.description: List of substrings to ban from prompt

steps.name: Detect and redact secrets (API keys, tokens, private keys) — runs BEFORE PII to prevent phone regex from eating key suffixes
Detect and redact PII (emails, phones, SSNs, credit cards, IPs) — runs AFTER secrets so keys are already redacted
